title: Relics: Sable Compat
description: Fixes Relics Chorus Staff teleporting incorrectly on Sable/Create Aeronautics moving contraptions and sublevels
body:
Relics Sable Compat fixes an incompatibility between the Chorus Staff from Relics and moving Sable/Create Aeronautics sublevels and contraptions.

Without this patch, the Chorus Staff can teleport players to incorrect positions when targeting blocks or contraptions inside Sable-managed sublevels. This happens because the original teleport raycast uses local sublevel coordinates instead of world-space coordinates.|

This compatibility mod patches the Chorus Staff teleport logic using Sable Companion so teleport destinations are properly projected back into world coordinates before teleporting the player.

Tested With
- Minecraft 1.21.1
- NeoForge
- Relics
- Sable
- Create
- Create Aeronautics

Dependencies

Required:
- Relics
- Sable

Optional:
- Create
- Create Aeronautics
